latest_iteration.title: This Thing, One Change
latest_iteration.lesson: test whether image, timed text, and voice become clearer when they all point to the same object.
latest_iteration.intended_idea: A precise message lands when the scene, timed text, and voice all point to the same object at the same time.
latest_iteration.narration_script: This is the thing in front of you. Choose one small change. Make it real.
latest_iteration.safety_state: No cron job was changed and no public post was made.

lessons.lesson: start with one visible artifact before trying autonomy.
make evaluation, rubric, and next action visible.
treat Christopher's correction as part of the learning loop.
preserve each lesson in a concise archive so the loop accumulates learning instead of novelty.
store each iteration's lesson and output data in a small structured record so future consolidation has a reliable source.
leave a minimal audit trail for each run so trust can be checked without expanding the maintenance burden.
keep the evolving object distinct from the scaffolding that records its evolution.
complete each turn as evaluation plus implemented change, without adding a forward-looking target section.
make the collaboration itself visible as the evolving object, not only the process that supports it.
treat an interrupted or timed-out run as recoverable signal by recording what persisted, what vanished, and what changed next.
separate the public-facing image and saying from the evaluation machinery so the artifact can stand on its own.
judge the intended idea, image, and text as one isolated artifact; when it works, sidestep toward deeper resonance.
move from receiving a signal to embodied action by making the consequence of the idea visible.
when image and caption feel disjointed, integrate short text inside the scene to give the idea context.
make the artifact speak to the viewer with a clear sequence of attention, choice, and action.
test whether image, timed text, and voice become clearer when they all point to the same object.
